text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We wish you a spectacular, magnificent, very
happy birthday! We got you a present too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I get to have birthday wishes and birthday presents?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I… I'm just so happy right now!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We got you one of those carrot scones 
they just came out with. It's very tasty.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe… We lined up early in the morning 
to get it! Treasure it for life!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I do want to eat it, 
but I'll treasure it for life!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Th-That was a joke! Please eat it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
…No need to panic, El — I doubt Spe would 
be able to resist anyway.
